title: K2 Minecraft Optimization
description: K2 has lots of features and mods, but is also heavily optimized so you can play minecraft at a much higher fps.
body:
![PanBlocks](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/832279327747080243/1172616129227788399/logofull.png)

PanBlocks K2 is a part of the PanBlocks modpack series. PanBlocks K2 is the new edition made for amazing fps, cool and helpful mods and much more. It's made for the new version of minecraft 1.19. The modpack will continue developing and is in it's early stages at the moment. The modpack can get up to 5x more fps than vanilla and 3x more than some other optimization clients and modpacks. It has been tested with lots of clients and modpacks. In our tests our client had 1400 fps while vanilla was at 700. Custom resource packs and mods are also being worked on. If you are struggling with getting higher fps, this modpack is just for you. Works on both Mac and Windows. Linux will most likely also work but has not been tested.



🚀 Optimization mods. 😎 Better graphics. 👑 Helpful mods and QOL mods.
Click here for a list of mods | Command | About | Version | | ------------- | ------------- | ------------- | | [advancementinfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo) | Make it easier to see which advancements you have and what's missing. | 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 | | [amecs](https://modrinth.com/mod/amecs) | A lot of keybind utilities | 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 | | [antighost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost) | Mod that helps you get rid of ghost blocks around yourself. Use /ghost or type the g key (can be rebound) to request block-resends. | 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 | | [better-beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds) | Changes the renderer of the bed to use block models instead of a block entity renderer! | 0.1, 0.2 | | [better-mount-hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) | Improves the ingame HUD while riding a mount | 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 | | [betterf3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) | Replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD. | 0.1, 0.2 | | [blockify](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockify) | Allows users to passthrough their Spotify information into Minecraft | 0.1, 0.2 | | [borderless-mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) | Adds a windowed borderless (fullscreen) option | 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 | | [capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) | A Fabric mod that lets you use capes from Optifine, LabyMod, Cosmetica, Wynntils, Capes++, and the MinecraftCapes Mod. | 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 | | [cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) | An API for config screens. | 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 | | [completeconfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/completeconfig) | Configuration library | 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 | | [cull-less-leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves) | Cull leaves while looking hot! | 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 | | [deathlog](https://modrinth.com/mod/deathlog) | Keeps track of the many embarrassing times you died | 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 | | [entity-collision-fps-fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-collision-fps-fix) | Removes client side collision checks, which boosts FPS. ⚠️ INFO TO MOD CREATORS ⚠️
As you can see this modpack uses a lot of mods made by other amazing creators. If you own any of these mods please contact me if you don't want your mod in the pack. I will completely remove your mod from the pack right away if there's any problems.



paninjaz@proton.me
nothanker
